zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Fiske於1437年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Symon Fiske41歲，母親Susanna Smyth36歲。他於1472年之後與Margaret在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年5月13日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Fiske was born in 1437, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Symon Fiske, was 41 and his mother, Susanna Smyth, was 36. He married Margaret after 1472, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 13 May 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Fiske est né en 1437, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Symon Fiske, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Susanna Smyth, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret après 1472, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Fiske 1437 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Symon Fiske 41 und seine Mutter Susanna Smyth 36. Er hat nach 1472 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Mai 1504 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Laxfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Fiske è nato il nel 1437 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Symon Fiske, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Smyth, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret dopo il 1472, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 maggio 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiskeが1437年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Symon Fiskeは41歳，母Susanna Smythは36歳であった。1472年以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年5月13日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラクスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske(이)가 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Symon Fiske(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Smyth(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1472년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 5월 13일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 라스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Fiske nasceu em 1437, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Symon Fiske, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Smyth, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret após 1472, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de maio de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Fiske родился в 1437 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Symon Fiske было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Susanna Smyth, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret после 1472 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 мая 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Fiske nació en 1437, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Symon Fiske, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Susanna Smyth, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret después de 1472, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
